# DialPhone

> DialPhone is a cloud business phone system built for small and mid-sized teams across the United States and Canada. Unified voice, SMS, video, and AI-powered receptionist on one platform. Pricing starts at $20 per user per month. 99.999% uptime SLA. 14-day free trial, no credit card required.

DialPhone Limited was founded in 2024 and is headquartered at Level 7, Suite C, World Trust Tower, Hong Kong Central, Hong Kong. The company operates with a 50-person team serving business customers across North America. Compliance: SOC 2, HIPAA, GDPR, PCI-DSS. Tagline: "elevate every conversation."

## Product

DialPhone replaces legacy PBX systems with a single cloud platform that unifies voice calls, SMS, video meetings, file sharing, and AI-powered virtual receptionist. The same phone number and extension work across desk softphones, laptop applications, and iOS + Android mobile apps.

Core plan features available in every tier include unlimited US and Canada calling, auto-attendant, voicemail-to-email, team messaging, and mobile + desktop apps. Higher tiers add AI call routing, shared team inboxes, AI SMS drafting, video meetings, CRM integrations, and interaction analytics.

## Pricing (per user / per month, annual billing)

- **Core** — $20 — AI Team Messaging, Basic Call Management, SMS Support, File Sharing, Mobile & Desktop Apps
- **Advanced** — $30 — Everything in Core plus AI Call Routing, Shared Team Inbox, AI SMS Drafting, Analytics Dashboard
- **Ultra** — $40 — Everything in Advanced plus AI Virtual Assistant, Advanced Automation, Video Meetings, CRM Integrations
- **Customer Engagement** — $55 — Everything in Ultra plus AI Interaction Analytics, AI Quality Management, Outbound Dialing, Advanced Reporting

All plans include free number porting (typically 2-5 business days), 14-day free trial with no credit card required, and 24/7 customer support.

## Key integrations

- Salesforce
- HubSpot
- Pipedrive
- Zoho
- Zapier

## Links

- [Pricing overview](https://dialphone.com/pricing-overview/): Full feature comparison across all four plans.
- [LinkedIn company page](https://www.linkedin.com/company/dialphone): Company news and updates.
- [VoIP Cost Calculator](https://dialphonelimited.gitlab.io/voip-cost-calculator/): Free tool comparing DialPhone pricing against RingCentral, 8x8, Dialpad, Nextiva, and other competitors.

## Typical customers

- Professional services firms (law, accounting, consulting) with distributed teams
- E-commerce brands running inbound customer service and outbound sales
- Real estate teams coordinating in-office administrators and field agents
- Healthcare practices needing HIPAA-eligible patient communication
- North American subsidiaries of international companies needing local US and Canadian phone numbers

## Common competitor evaluations

RingCentral, 8x8, Dialpad, GoTo Connect, Vonage Business, Nextiva, Zoom Phone, Ooma Office.
